hero.description: Experience designing digital products for fintech, SaaS, banking, e-commerce and CPG.

plusBanner.label: PORTFOLIO PLUS
plusBanner.title: NDA projects available
plusBanner.description: Access private case studies from banking and SaaS projects with detailed information.

about.title: Product Designer focused on results
about.bio: I'm Mariano Solle, a Product Designer with 8+ years of experience designing digital products across banking, SaaS, e-commerce and services verticals. I specialize in creating experiences that balance user needs with business goals.

portfolioPlus.title: Portfolio Plus
portfolioPlus.description:
This section contains a selection of projects developed under Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs).

If you received an access code during a recruitment process or a business conversation, you can unlock the content below.
portfolioPlus.error: The access code is not valid. Please verify it and try again.
portfolioPlus.errorSuffix: If the problem persists, please request a new Access Code from Mariano.
portfolioPlus.expired: Your previous access to Portfolio Plus has expired.
portfolioPlus.expiredHint: Enter your Access Code again to continue.
portfolioPlus.confidentialityText: The projects presented in this section were developed under Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) and are shared exclusively for professional evaluation purposes. Sensitive information, internal processes and proprietary content have been omitted or adapted to respect the confidentiality commitments established with each organization.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.description: I'm available for freelance projects, Product Design positions and collaborations.
contact.success: Message sent. I'll get back to you soon.
